item.title: Farming in Minnesota Is Fun!
item.description: A look at the joys of farming in Minnesota. From planting to harvest, see the daily work, scenery, and satisfaction that comes with life on the farm.

media:content.media:title: Farming in Minnesota Is Fun!
media:content.media:description: A look at the joys of farming in Minnesota. From planting to harvest, see the daily work, scenery, and satisfaction that comes with life on the farm.

item.title: Trading Planters Is Almost as Bad as Combines
item.description: The challenges of trading planters can rival handling combines. See the process, frustrations, and lessons learned in swapping out this essential farm equipment.

media:content.media:title: Trading Planters Is Almost as Bad as Combines
media:content.media:description: The challenges of trading planters can rival handling combines. See the process, frustrations, and lessons learned in swapping out this essential farm equipment.

item.title: Doing Everything We Were Told Not to Do!
item.description: Breaking all the rules and tackling tasks you’re warned against. Watch the chaos, surprises, and unexpected results that come from doing the opposite of instructions.

media:content.media:title: Doing Everything We Were Told Not to Do!
media:content.media:description: Breaking all the rules and tackling tasks you’re warned against. Watch the chaos, surprises, and unexpected results that come from doing the opposite of instructions.

item.title: Nothing Lasts Forever
item.description: A reflection on change, wear, or the end of an era. See the moments and events that remind us everything is temporary.

media:content.media:title: Nothing Lasts Forever
media:content.media:description: A reflection on change, wear, or the end of an era. See the moments and events that remind us everything is temporary.

item.title: There’s 9,000 Hours on This!
item.description: A machine or vehicle with 9,000 hours of use. See how it’s held up, maintenance insights, and the performance after extensive operation.

media:content.media:title: There’s 9,000 Hours on This!
media:content.media:description: A machine or vehicle with 9,000 hours of use. See how it’s held up, maintenance insights, and the performance after extensive operation.

item.title: Before This Planter Leaves, Everything Must Come Off
item.description: Prepping a planter for transport or sale by removing all attachments. Watch the step-by-step process to safely disassemble and prepare it for departure.

media:content.media:title: Before This Planter Leaves, Everything Must Come Off
media:content.media:description: Prepping a planter for transport or sale by removing all attachments. Watch the step-by-step process to safely disassemble and prepare it for departure.

item.title: That Plug Exploded! Hydraulic Oil Disaster
item.description: A hydraulic system failure causes a sudden oil explosion. See the cleanup, damage assessment, and lessons learned from this messy mechanical disaster.

media:content.media:title: That Plug Exploded! Hydraulic Oil Disaster
media:content.media:description: A hydraulic system failure causes a sudden oil explosion. See the cleanup, damage assessment, and lessons learned from this messy mechanical disaster.

item.title: Another Huge Storm Hits the Yard
item.description: A massive storm impacts the yard with wind, rain, and debris. See the aftermath, preparations, and challenges faced during severe weather.

media:content.media:title: Another Huge Storm Hits the Yard
media:content.media:description: A massive storm impacts the yard with wind, rain, and debris. See the aftermath, preparations, and challenges faced during severe weather.

item.title: New Salford Arrives on the Yard
item.description: A brand-new Salford machine is delivered to the yard. Watch the unboxing, setup, and first impressions of this powerful piece of farm equipment.

media:content.media:title: New Salford Arrives on the Yard
media:content.media:description: A brand-new Salford machine is delivered to the yard. Watch the unboxing, setup, and first impressions of this powerful piece of farm equipment.
